name: Game.Area

values.name: draggable
values.comment:
assigns three events: onMouseUp, onMouseDown and onClick (useful for touch screens).

onClick will perform the onPress action and if that does not exist, it will perform the onRelease action instead.
values.type: { onPress : Maybe.Maybe msg, onRelease : Maybe.Maybe msg } -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: hoverable
values.comment: Define hover events
values.type: { onEnter : Maybe.Maybe msg, onLeave : Maybe.Maybe msg } -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: map
values.comment: Map the contents of a list of entities
values.type: (Basics.Int -> a -> b) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity b)

values.name: mapPosition
values.comment: Map the position of each entity in a list
values.type: (Basics.Int -> a -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float )) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a)

values.name: mapPositionRandomly
values.comment: Move each element of the list to a random position.
values.type: (Basics.Int -> a -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Random.Generator ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float )) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> Random.Generator (List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a))

values.name: mapRotation
values.comment: Map the rotation of each entity in a list
values.type: (Basics.Int -> a -> Basics.Float -> Basics.Float) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a)

values.name: mapRotationRandomly
values.comment: Apply a random rotation to each element of the list.
values.type: (Basics.Int -> a -> Basics.Float -> Random.Generator Basics.Float) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> Random.Generator (List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a))

values.name: mapZIndex
values.comment: Map the z-Index of each entity in a list
values.type: (Basics.Int -> a -> Basics.Int -> Basics.Int) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a)

values.name: new
values.comment: create a new entity in an area using a position and a key(string).
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> List.List ( String.String, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg ) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity ( String.String, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg ))

values.name: pileAbove
values.comment: Create a pile in an area.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( String.String, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg ) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity ( String.String, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg )) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity ( String.String, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg ))

values.name: toHtml
values.comment:
Turn the area into Html. Animation can only happen within an area. If an entity should move from one area into another, you have to use `pileAbove` to define the sub-areas.

You can change the transition speed:

    speedInSec =
        0.5

    toHtml [Html.Attributes.style "transition" ("transform " ++ String.fromInt speedInSec ++ "s")]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity ( String.String, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg )) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: withLinearRotation
values.comment: rotate each element of a list evenly within a given interval.
values.type: { min : Basics.Float, max : Basics.Float } -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a)

values.name: withPolarPosition
values.comment: move each element in a list evenly with respect to angle and distance of the original position.
values.type: { minAngle : Basics.Float, maxAngle : Basics.Float, minDistance : Basics.Float, maxDistance : Basics.Float } -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a) -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity a)

name: Game.Card

values.name: back
values.comment: Displays a card with the content centered. Use this to design your card backs.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: backgroundImage
values.comment: Sets the background to an image
values.type: String.String -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: coin
values.comment: Displays a coin.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: default
values.comment: Displays an default view of a card.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: element
values.comment: Displays a content with a padding
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: empty
values.comment: Display an empty card-sized space with some text
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg

values.name: fillingImage
values.comment: Displays a image that will take up as much space as possible
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg

values.name: ratio
values.comment: Defines a aspect-ratio of an element. The ratio is `width/height`.
values.type: Basics.Float -> Html.Attribute msg

values.name: row
values.comment: A row on top of the card. It uses flexbox.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

name: Game.Entity

aliases.name: Entity
aliases.comment: A entity allows for different relative transformations like rotating or moving by a relative amount.
aliases.type: { position : ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ), rotation : Basics.Float, customTransformations : List.List Game.Entity.Transformation, zIndex : Basics.Int, content : a }

values.name: flipTransformation
values.comment: Flip the card. Only works if the outer div has a `perspective` Attribute
values.type: Basics.Float -> Game.Entity.Transformation

values.name: flippable
values.comment:
Create an entity that can be flipped

**For technical reasons we needed to provide a width. Default is a ratio of 2/3**

You can overrule the default by providing a width:

    height = 200

    ratio = 2/3

    flippable [Html.Attributes.style "width" (String.fromFloat (height * ratio) ++ "px")]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> { front : Game.Entity.Entity (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg), back : Game.Entity.Entity (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg), faceUp : Basics.Bool } -> Game.Entity.Entity (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg)

values.name: map
values.comment: map the content of a entity
values.type: (a -> b) -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity b

values.name: mapCustomTransformations
values.comment: map custom transformations
values.type: (List.List Game.Entity.Transformation -> List.List Game.Entity.Transformation) -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: mapPosition
values.comment: map position
values.type: (( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float )) -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: mapRotation
values.comment: map rotation
values.type: (Basics.Float -> Basics.Float) -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: mapZIndex
values.comment: map z-index
values.type: (Basics.Int -> Basics.Int) -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: move
values.comment: move a entity
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: moveTransformation
values.comment: Move the card
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Game.Entity.Transformation

values.name: new
values.comment: construct a entity
values.type: a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: perspective
values.comment: Activates a 3d-effect for the child notes. Should be used in combination with `flip`
values.type: Html.Attribute msg

values.name: pileAbove
values.comment: Group Entities into a pile
values.type: Html.Html msg -> List.List (Game.Entity.Entity (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg)) -> Game.Entity.Entity (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg)

values.name: rotate
values.comment: rotate a entity
values.type: Basics.Float -> Game.Entity.Entity a -> Game.Entity.Entity a

values.name: rotateTransformation
values.comment: Rotate the card by a radial.
values.type: Basics.Float -> Game.Entity.Transformation

values.name: scale
values.comment: Scale the card
values.type: Basics.Float -> Game.Entity.Transformation

values.name: toAttributes
values.comment: Attributes of a Entity
values.type: Game.Entity.Entity a -> ( a, List.List (Html.Attribute msg) )

values.name: toHtml
values.comment: turn the entity into html
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Game.Entity.Entity (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: transform
values.comment: Add transformations to a card
values.type: List.List Game.Entity.Transformation -> Html.Attribute msg
